Speaking

Invite Corey to speak

Storytelling, public health, prevention, and health equity — in a voice people can connect with.

Submit a Speaking Inquiry

Corey Dion Lewis speaks on the intersection of public health, prevention, storytelling, community outreach, podcasting, and health equity.

His talks help audiences understand how health is shaped by systems, stories, access, and lived experience.

Speaking topics

Talks that connect public health with culture and community.

  • Making public health culturally relevant

    Reaching audiences with messaging that respects identity, community, and lived experience.

  • Storytelling as a tool for health equity

    Using narrative to move people from awareness to action on the social drivers of health.

  • Social determinants of health in real life

    Translating SDOH frameworks into the everyday realities of the people we serve.

  • Prevention and community-centered care

    Designing prevention efforts that meet people where they live, work, and gather.

  • Podcasting as community outreach

    How public health organizations can use audio to build trust and reach new audiences.

  • Building trust through media and messaging

    Honest, transparent communication in an era of misinformation and skepticism.

  • Health equity, culture, and communication

    How public health professionals can communicate across difference and lead with care.

Booking

Submit a speaking inquiry

Share the details of your event and we'll be in touch.

The Healthy Project Podcast

A documentary-style audio archive of how communities confront structural health inequities.

Hosted by Corey Dion Lewis
